question: Is my CV data private?
reply: Yes. Your CV stays tied to your account — we don't share it, sell it, or train public AI models on it. You can delete your CVs and account whenever you want.

question: What file formats can I upload?
reply: PDF and DOCX. Both are parsed automatically, no reformatting needed on your end.

question: How is OptiCV different from just using ChatGPT?
reply: ChatGPT gives you generic advice. OptiCV reads your actual CV, scores it against a specific job, flags ATS issues, and gives you ready-to-export documents — all in one place, no prompt engineering required.

question: Do I need to install anything?
reply: No. OptiCV runs entirely in your browser. Sign in with your email — we'll send you a 6-digit code, no password to remember.

question: Can I cancel my Pro subscription anytime?
reply: Yes. Cancel in one click, keep Pro until the end of your billing period, then drop back to Free with no charge.

question: What's an ATS — and why should I care?
reply: An Applicant Tracking System is the software employers use to filter CVs before a human sees them. If your CV isn't formatted and worded the way an ATS expects, you can be rejected before anyone reads a word. OptiCV checks for those issues automatically.
